title: Amtech R0127 230mm (9") 9-in-1 Multi-Function Shears
features: DURABLE: These 230mm (9") 9-in-1 multi-function shears have high quality stainless steel blades with sharp, serrated cutting edges and the blades separate into knives
EASY TO USE: They have ergonomic, soft touch and non-slip handles for greater comfort and control
9 FUNCTIONS: Flat blade screwdriver, vegetable peeler, sharp blade cutting edge, bottle cap opener, nutcracker/cap opener and fish de-scaler
VERSATILE: They are ideal for kitchen, home, DIY, camping and fishing uses
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
description: These 230mm (9") 9-in-1 multi-function shears have high quality stainless steel blades with sharp, serrated cutting edges and the blades separate into knives. They have ergonomic, soft touch and non-slip handles for greater comfort and control. The 9 functions include: Flat blade screwdriver, vegetable peeler, sharp blade cutting edge, bottle cap opener, nutcracker/cap opener and fish de-scaler. They are ideal for kitchen, home, DIY, camping and fishing uses.
